summary: DHH announces that his company Next Angle has received a new logo designed by his friend Martin from Eyedive. He humorously suggests that a company isn't real until it has a good logo. The post is a brief, casual update celebrating the milestone of having a visual identity created for the business.
key_points: Next Angle received its logo, designed by DHH's friend Martin from Eyedive
DHH equates having a good logo with being a 'real' company
The logo still needs an accompanying typeface, which Martin is also working on
money_quotes: It's never a real company before you have a logo. And preferably a good one.
key_insight: A lighthearted early-career moment capturing DHH's belief that visual identity is a meaningful milestone in making a company feel real.
